header.persuadeTooltip: Persuade Lv.{{level}} (can persuade monsters with ≤{{level}} HP layers) / cost {{cost}}g{{discount}}

goal.objectiveBody1: You are an adventurer delving into the dungeon. The deck contains
goal.objectiveBody2: (monsters, weapons, shields, potions, spells, amulets, events). You must process every card and defeat all monsters before
goal.loopStep2Post: (attack monsters, equip weapons/shields, take potions, etc.).
goal.loopStep3Post: remains, the waterfall triggers — that card is auto-discarded, preview cards drop onto the board, and new previews are drawn from the deck.
goal.loopStep4: Repeat until the deck is empty.
goal.layoutTopBarDesc: ❤️ HP, 🪙 Gold, 📦 Deck count, 🌊 Waterfall count, 🏪 Shop level
goal.layoutRow2Desc: Active area (5 active cards) + 💀 Graveyard (discard pile)
goal.layoutRow3Desc: Amulet slots (cap 2) → Equipment slots ×2 → Hero → Backpack → Class deck
goal.recycleBagBodyA2: does not go to the graveyard after use; it enters the
goal.recycleBagBodyA3: . Each waterfall, cards in the bag tick down, and after a few turns they return to your backpack to be reused. You can also drag amulets and permanent equipment into the bag to recycle them. The Recycle Bag is the core engine of the game.
goal.classDeckIntroPost: (21 cards). You can obtain class cards by:
goal.classDeckListItem2Pre: Monster loot has a chance to grant a
goal.classDeckListItem3: Class cards can be purchased in shops

monster.title: Monster
monster.desc: Has HP layers and attack. Strip all layers with weapons to kill, otherwise the monster retaliates. Elites have special abilities, and the final foe ships as a Boss from the start.

weapon.title: Weapon
weapon.desc: Equip in the left/right slot; has durability. Drag onto a monster to attack. Each slot can attack only once per turn.

shield.title: Shield
shield.desc: Equip in a slot to block monster damage. Each block consumes 1 durability.

potion.title: Potion
potion.desc: One-shot consumables — heal, repair, draw from backpack, etc. Can be stashed in the backpack first.

amulet.title: Amulet
amulet.desc: Slot into the amulet bar (max 2) for ongoing passive effects. Adding a 3rd discards the oldest. Drag into the recycle bag to reuse.

magic.title: Magic
magic.desc: Two kinds: instant and permanent. Instant magic goes to the graveyard after use; permanent magic enters the Recycle Bag and returns to the backpack after a few waterfalls, reusable.

event.title: Event
event.desc: Click to reveal options. Could be a shop, chest, altar, shrine, etc. — pick one to gain rewards or take risks.

backpack.title: Backpack & Hand
backpack.desc: Stores non-monster, non-event cards (cap 12–17). Resolving an active card auto-draws one from backpack into hand. Hand cap is 6–8.

combat.flowIntroPre: Monsters on the board never attack first. Combat is
combat.flowHeroFirstB: onto a monster — you strike first; the monster only retaliates if it survives.
combat.flowMonsterFirstB: onto the hero — the monster hits you first, then you take your turn.
combat.heroAttack1Post: , and each equipment slot can only attack once.
combat.heroAttack2: Weapon damage = base value + bonuses (amulets, skills, class, etc.).
combat.heroAttack3Post: . When durability hits 0, the weapon breaks.
combat.heroAttack4Post: : damage doubles on a successful dice roll.
combat.layersBodyA: Monster HP is composed of multiple
combat.layersBodyC: (shown as stacked bars below the number). When attack damage ≥ the current layer's value, that layer breaks; overflow does NOT carry to the next layer. Strip all layers to
combat.block1Pre: When a monster retaliates, you can
combat.block2: A shield absorbs damage (up to its value); overflow goes to your HP. Blocking costs 1 durability.
combat.block3: Special shields (e.g. Iron Tower Shield) fully block all damage; reflect shields bounce half the damage back to the monster.
combat.block4: Dragging a monster onto the hero = take the full damage with no block.
combat.turnBodyPre: After your attack phase ends (out of attacks or you end manually), the
combat.turnBodyPost: begins — every engaged monster attacks you in order. After each, you choose how to block. Once all monsters have attacked, your turn restarts with refreshed attacks. Repeat until monsters die or you fall.
combat.elite1Post: (later half of the deck) have special abilities: Skeletons revive, Ghosts respawn, Ogres crit-chain, etc.
combat.elite2Post: ships as a Boss from the start, with built-in necromancy summon and revival.

actions.attackDesc: Drag a weapon onto a monster (or drag a monster onto a slot with a weapon). If damage ≥ layer, kill; otherwise the monster retaliates.
actions.blockDesc: Drag a monster onto a slot with a shield (block then retaliate), or directly onto the hero to take the full hit.
actions.equipDesc: Drag a weapon/shield to a slot. New gear replaces old (old goes to graveyard).
actions.storeDesc: Drag a card to the backpack. Monsters and events can't be stashed. Full backpack means no room.
actions.amuletDesc: Drag an amulet to a slot. Exceeding the cap auto-discards the oldest.
actions.magicDesc: Click a magic card and follow the prompts. Permanent magic returns via the Recycle Bag.
actions.eventDesc: Click an event and pick one option. Some require dice rolls.
actions.discardDesc: Drag a card to the graveyard area (rightmost on row 2) to discard. Discarded cards are gone.
actions.skillDesc: Click the skill button on the hero card (once per waterfall) and pick a target.
actions.diceDesc: Click the D20 (top right). For 50/50 events: ≤10 succeeds, >10 fails.
actions.logDesc: The log panel on the right records all combat, damage, healing, equipment, magic, and event activity. Drag to resize, minimize, or clear. When in doubt, check the log.

tips.tip1Body: the last card on the board is auto-discarded. Try to leave the cards you don't need until the end.
tips.tip2Body: stash potions and good gear, then play from hand when needed. Backpack auto-draws after every action — keep your hand topped up.
tips.tip3Body: after use it goes to the recycle bag and returns to your backpack after a few waterfalls. Cycling these is the key to victory.
tips.tip4Body: weapons and shields wear out. Repair potions and the "Master Repair" magic keep them alive.
tips.tip5Body: killing monsters and events earn gold. Use shops to buy strong cards and extra skills.
tips.tip6Body: the row above always shows what's coming next. Plan equipment swaps and backpack space accordingly.
tips.tip7Body: Heal, Flash, and Power amulets all do different things. Combined with hero skills they multiply your impact.
tips.tip8Bold: Elites appear in the back half:
tips.tip8Body: the front of the deck is mostly basic monsters. Stockpile gear and potions before elites arrive.
tips.uiClickDeck: • Click <0>the deck count</0> to view what's left
tips.uiClickGrave: • Click <0>the graveyard</0> to view discard history
tips.uiClickBackpack: • Click <0>the backpack</0> to view stored cards
tips.uiClickClassDeck: • Click <0>the class deck</0> (bottom-right) to view Knight-only cards
tips.uiHover: • Long-press / hover any card to see full details
tips.uiLogPanel: • <0>📋 Log panel</0> (right): real-time record of combat, damage, healing, equipment, magic, etc. Drag to resize/move; supports minimize and clear
tips.uiCombatPanel: • <0>⚔️ Combat panel</0> (right): pops in during combat, showing the current turn (hero/monster), remaining attacks, slot status, and pending blocks. On hero turn click "End Turn" to hand control to the monster
tips.uiUndo: • <0>↩️ Undo button</0> (bottom-right): undoes recent actions (equip, stash, discard, etc.). Cannot undo during combat or waterfall. The number shows undo depth

select.title: Choose a Hero Skill
select.subtitle: Pick one of the three skills below to begin your adventure

turnTimer.pausedAriaLabel: Hero turn timer paused (a stunned monster is on the active row); {{seconds}} seconds remaining

cardBack.ariaPickFlip: Pick this preview card to flip

deckPeek.title: Deck Preview
deckPeek.subtitle: View the top {{count}} cards of the deck

monsterFusion.title: Monster Fusion
monsterFusion.description2: monster equipment from equipment slots / hand / backpack to fuse (Elite, Lv3). Pick
monsterFusion.description3: to fuse into the Skeleton King.
monsterFusion.empty: No same-race monster equipment available (need ≥ 2 of the same race in equipment / hand / backpack).

graveyardExile.title: Wraith Blade — Soul Banish
graveyardExile.description: Pick cards in the graveyard to exile from the game (multiple OK, none OK too). Exiled cards are gone forever.

backpackReorganize.title: Reorganize Backpack
backpackReorganize.description: Backpack capacity +1. Pick up to {{max}} card(s) from hand / amulets / equipment to place back at the top of the backpack; you may pick none.
backpackReorganize.noteSmall: Equipment/amulets are taken directly, without triggering any break or transform effects; the selection order is the placement order, with the last pick going in last.

discoverClass.title: Discover a Class Card
discoverClass.description: Pick one of the three candidate cards; the rest go back into the Class Deck.
discoverClass.empty: No Class Cards available to discover

cardDeletion.title: Pick cards to delete
cardDeletion.subtitle: Pick {{count}} card(s) to delete
cardDeletion.defaultDescription: Deleted cards go to the graveyard and won't return to hand or backpack.
cardDeletion.discardRecycleHint: Cards that can be discarded to the graveyard come first; Perm cards still go to the recycle bag.
cardDeletion.emptyBackpack: No cards available in the backpack.
cardDeletion.emptyRecycleBag: No cards available in the recycle bag.
cardDeletion.emptyEquipment: No cards available in equipment slots.
cardDeletion.emptyAmulet: No cards available in amulet slots.

cardDetails.uniqueTooltip: Unique card. Once obtained this run, it will not appear again.

shop.title: Adventurer's Shop
shop.descriptionFromEvent: {{name}} shows you their wares. Spend gold to buy any card.
shop.descriptionDefault: Spend gold to buy Class cards you fancy.
shop.emptyOfferings: No Class cards for sale today.
shop.deleteCardDesc: Pick a card from hand or backpack to send straight to the graveyard.
shop.attackDesc: Spend {{cost}} gold for permanent +1 attack on all equipment slots.
shop.attackUsedNote: Attack boost already used this visit.
shop.armorDesc: Spend {{cost}} gold for permanent +1 armor on all equipment slots.
shop.armorUsedNote: Armor boost already used this visit.
shop.levelUpDesc: Spend {{cost}} gold to level up the shop; next visit shows more offers.
shop.discoverSkillDesc: Spend {{cost}} gold to discover a new hero skill — pick 1 of 3 to learn.
shop.refreshDesc: Spend {{cost}} gold to re-roll all offerings and restore the per-visit charges of every other button (delete / heal / attack boost / armor boost / level up / discover skill).

permGrant.title: Eternal Inscription
permGrant.subtitle: Pick one equipment/amulet/potion/magic to make permanent
permGrant.defaultDescription: Pick a hand card to grant Perm 3 (returns to backpack after 3 waterfalls when removed)
permGrant.defaultEmpty: No hand cards eligible for the eternal trait
permGrant.title_flankGainBoltGrant: Arcane Fission · Flank: Gain Magic Bolt
permGrant.title_onHandAddBoltBackpackGrant: Arcane Fission · On-Hand: Backpack Magic Bolt
permGrant.title_transformAmplifyBoltGrant: Arcane Fission · Transform: Amplify Magic Bolt
permGrant.desc_equipmentEnchant: Discard a piece of equipment from hand and randomly enchant its attack/armor onto an equipped item
permGrant.desc_essenceExtract: Delete a hand card (send it to the graveyard). One-shot magic→Left attack +1; equipment→Right attack +1; amulet→Right armor +1; monster/potion→Left armor +1
permGrant.desc_transformGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: lose 3 HP, gain a random magic card from the graveyard'
permGrant.desc_flankGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: draw 1 card' (triggers when played from leftmost or rightmost hand position)
permGrant.desc_flankGoldGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: +3 gold' (triggers when played from leftmost or rightmost hand position)
permGrant.desc_flankPersuadeGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: persuade cost permanently -1' (any type)
permGrant.desc_flankStunGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: stun cap +5%' (any type)
permGrant.desc_flankDamageGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: deal 5 damage to a random monster' (any type)
permGrant.desc_transformDrawGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Transform: draw 2 cards' (any type)
permGrant.desc_transformHealGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Transform: restore 2 HP' (any type)
permGrant.desc_transformRecycleGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Transform: discard 1 hand card, then take 1 random card back from the recycle bag'
permGrant.desc_amuletPermGrant: Pick an equipped amulet to grant Perm 2 (returns to backpack after 2 waterfalls when removed)
permGrant.desc_onHandStunCapGrant: Pick a hand card and permanently grant 'On-hand: stun cap +3%' (triggers each time it enters hand; cards with other on-hand traits are ineligible)
permGrant.desc_onHandHealGrant: Pick a hand card and permanently grant 'On-hand: restore 1 HP' (triggers each time it enters hand; cards with other on-hand traits are ineligible)
permGrant.desc_onHandGoldGrant: Pick a hand card and permanently grant 'On-hand: gold +2' (triggers each time it enters hand; cards with other on-hand traits are ineligible)
permGrant.desc_onHandTopGrant: Pick a hand card and permanently grant the 'Pin-to-Top' keyword (when shuffled back from the recycle bag, goes straight to the first slot of the backpack; cards already pinned are ineligible)
permGrant.desc_onHandTempArmorGrant: Pick a hand card and permanently grant 'On-hand: random equipment slot +1 temporary armor' (triggers each time it enters hand; cards with other on-hand traits are ineligible)
permGrant.desc_flankGainBoltGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: when played, gain 1 「Magic Bolt」 to hand' (any type)
permGrant.desc_onHandAddBoltBackpackGrant: Pick a hand card and permanently grant 'On-hand: gain 1 「Magic Bolt」 to backpack' (triggers each time it enters hand; cards with other on-hand traits are ineligible)
permGrant.desc_flankSpawnMineGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Flank: when played, spawn a 「Mine」 in a random empty slot of the active row' (any type)
permGrant.desc_transformMineDamageGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Transform: on trigger, all mines deal +2 damage (permanent, stackable)' (any type)
permGrant.desc_transformAmplifyBoltGrant: Pick a hand card to grant 'Transform: on trigger, all 「Magic Bolt」 cards gain +2 amplify (permanent)' (any type)
permGrant.empty_equipmentEnchant: No equipment in hand to discard
permGrant.empty_essenceExtract: No hand cards available to delete
permGrant.empty_flankGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_flankGoldGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_transformGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_flankPersuadeGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_flankStunGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_flankDamageGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_transformDrawGrant: No hand cards eligible for a transform effect
permGrant.empty_flankHealGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_transformRecycleGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_amuletPermGrant: No amulets eligible for Perm 2 (all amulets are already Perm 2 or stronger)
permGrant.empty_onHandStunCapGrant: No hand cards eligible for 'On-hand: stun cap +3%'
permGrant.empty_onHandHealGrant: No hand cards eligible for 'On-hand: restore 1 HP'
permGrant.empty_onHandGoldGrant: No hand cards eligible for 'On-hand: gold +2'
permGrant.empty_onHandTopGrant: No hand cards eligible for the 'Pin-to-Top' keyword
permGrant.empty_onHandTempArmorGrant: No hand cards eligible for 'On-hand: random armor +1'
permGrant.empty_flankGainBoltGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_onHandAddBoltBackpackGrant: No hand cards eligible for 'On-hand: backpack +1 Magic Bolt'
permGrant.empty_flankSpawnMineGrant: No hand cards eligible for a flank effect
permGrant.empty_transformMineDamageGrant: No hand cards eligible for a transform effect
permGrant.empty_transformAmplifyBoltGrant: No hand cards eligible for a transform effect

amplify.title: Amplify
amplify.descriptionWithBackpack: Pick equipment or damage magic from equipment slots / hand / backpack to amplify.
amplify.descriptionWithoutBackpack: Pick equipment from your slots, or equipment / damage magic from your hand to amplify.

cardUpgrade.title: Card Upgrade
cardUpgrade.subtitle: Pick a card to upgrade
cardUpgrade.subtitleWithRemaining: Pick a card to upgrade ({{count}} remaining)

cardDraft.title: Draft
cardDraft.subtitle: Pick a card
cardDraft.promptEquipment: Pick one piece of equipment to add to your backpack
cardDraft.promptPotion: Pick one potion to add to your backpack
cardDraft.promptAmulet: Pick one amulet to add to your backpack
cardDraft.promptGeneral: Pick one of the three cards below to add to your backpack

deckViewer.title: Deck
deckViewer.subtitle: {{count}} cards remaining
deckViewer.empty: The deck is empty. Victory is near!

backpackViewer.title: Backpack
backpackViewer.description: Storage area; cards in the backpack are unordered and unaffected by waterfall.
backpackViewer.headerDescription: Backpack cards are unordered; drawing picks at random
backpackViewer.emptyShort: No cards in the backpack yet
backpackViewer.recycleSectionHint: The number next to the waterfall icon is turns remaining; resolves at the start of the next waterfall.

monsterPersuade.title: Persuade
monsterPersuade.subtitle: Success rate {{rate}}% (cost {{cost}}g)
monsterPersuade.rollHint: Roll a d20 — {{threshold}} or higher to succeed.
monsterPersuade.stunnedHint: Target is stunned; success rate is slightly higher.
monsterPersuade.successHint: On success {{name}} joins your backpack, HP layers convert to durability ({{layers}} layers → {{layers}} durability).
monsterPersuade.equipHint: Once equipped from your backpack, the monster's abilities translate into equipment effects.
monsterPersuade.rageReleaseHint: Whether you succeed or fail, the monster will calm down (rage cleared).

eventDice.title: Dice Roll
eventDice.defaultSubtitle: Roll the d20 to determine your fate.

mirrorCopy.title: Mirror Image
mirrorCopy.subtitle: Pick a card to copy
mirrorCopy.description: Pick a card from your equipment, amulet slots, or hand — gain a copy of it in your hand.
mirrorCopy.empty: No cards available to copy (equipment, amulets, and hand are all empty).

shopSkillSelect.title: Choose a Skill
shopSkillSelect.subtitle: Pick one of the three skills below
shopSkillSelect.discoverDesc: Choose 1 of the 3 skills below to learn. You'll gain it immediately.
shopSkillSelect.helpText: Click a skill card to choose

handMagicUpgrade.title: Arcane Refinement
handMagicUpgrade.subtitle: Pick a magic in your hand to upgrade
handMagicUpgrade.description: Pick up to {{max}} magic card(s) in your hand to upgrade ({{count}}/{{max}} selected)
handMagicUpgrade.empty: No upgradeable magic in your hand

gameModeSelect.title: Choose Game Mode
gameModeSelect.subtitle: Single / Multiplayer
gameModeSelect.singleModeDesc: 36-card deck, 10 monsters, 3 elites. The complete solo dungeon adventure.
gameModeSelect.multiplayerModeDesc: Two players share one 36-card deck. Cards pushed out by waterfall transfer to each other. Async play except for the final boss.

multiplayerLobby.title: Multiplayer Lobby
multiplayerLobby.subtitle: Create a room or join your friend's
multiplayerLobby.displayNameHint: Saved on this device for next time
multiplayerLobby.waitingForPeerHint: Share the code with your friend and wait for them to join.
multiplayerLobby.errorAuthFailed: Anonymous sign-in failed. Please refresh and try again.
multiplayerLobby.errorServiceUnavailable: Server not configured. Multiplayer is unavailable.
multiplayerLobby.errorRoomNotFound: Room not found or already ended.

multiplayerBossAlert.title: Boss fight is solo for now
multiplayerBossAlert.description: This Boss fight will resolve as a solo encounter. You and your partner each finish your own Boss — card transfers keep flowing as usual.

multiplayerConnection.freezeDescDisconnected: Can't reach the server or your room. Waiting to reconnect — actions are paused. You can also start a new single-player game.
multiplayerConnection.freezeDescSyncFailed: We tried sending your last waterfall cards several times but the server didn't respond. Try again or start a new single-player game.
